query: Deploy a Together AI dedicated endpoint for Qwen, choose hardware, and autoscale it between 1 and 4 replicas.
I finished a Together fine-tune and now need to host the resulting model on a single-tenant endpoint.
Upload a custom Hugging Face model to Together AI and serve it from a dedicated endpoint.
Create a custom Docker container with Sprocket and deploy it behind the Together queue API.
Spin up an H200 cluster with Kubernetes because I want to run my own training jobs.
Build a serverless streaming chatbot on Together AI with JSON outputs.
